codesAndKillSoundIds.title: The Strongest Battlegrounds Codes and Kill Sound IDs
codesAndKillSoundIds.intro: Use these active kill sound IDs in The Strongest Battlegrounds to customize KO sound effects. Paste only numeric IDs in the in-game customize field.

items.note: Use in Settings > Customize Kill Sound.
Paste numbers only, then rejoin if the sound does not apply.
Works as a KO sound replacement after unlock.
Good for short and clean feedback audio.
Popular meme choice for private server sessions.
Classic clip style for highlight rounds.

beginnerGuide.title: The Strongest Battlegrounds Beginner Guide
beginnerGuide.intro: Learn movement, defense, and simple pressure before you attempt long combo routes in public lobbies.

steps.title: Start with movement and block timing
steps.description: Practice forward dash pressure, side-dash evasion, and front-facing blocks before chasing damage.

steps.title: Build damage with short M1 routes
steps.description: Use reliable 3 to 4 hit strings and reset spacing instead of overextending into punish windows.

steps.title: Save evasive for high-risk knockdown chains
steps.description: Do not spend evasive on every fall. Hold it for wall pressure or close-range awakening finishers.

steps.title: Awaken when you are already in range
steps.description: Trigger awakening at a distance where you can force immediate interaction and convert meter value.

charactersAndMovesets.title: The Strongest Battlegrounds Characters and Movesets
charactersAndMovesets.intro: Each moveset changes pressure style, combo length, and neutral control. Pick based on your current comfort level.

items.name: The Strongest Hero
items.description: Simple confirms and direct finish options make this the easiest opening route.

items.name: Hero Hunter
items.description: Strong conversion tools when you read dashes and force whiff responses.

items.name: Destructive Cyborg
items.description: Reliable space control and straight-line pressure in public server fights.

items.name: Deadly Ninja
items.description: Excels in quick entries, side pressure, and fast disengage loops.

items.name: Brutal Demon
items.description: Great for forcing mistakes with oppressive close-range threat windows.

items.name: Blade Master
items.description: High reward when spacing and timing are consistent across wall routes.

tierList.title: The Strongest Battlegrounds Tier List
tierList.intro: This list prioritizes public server stability, confirm consistency, and pressure value in common matchups.

tiers.reason: Best blend of neutral control and reliable conversion windows.
Very stable picks with strong pressure and easier confirms.
Strong with matchup knowledge, but less consistent for new players.
Useful in specific situations but lower all-around consistency.

combosAndTechniques.title: The Strongest Battlegrounds Combos and Techniques
combosAndTechniques.intro: Learn reliable The Strongest Battlegrounds combo routes first, then add wall combo timing, uppercut dash extensions, delayed M1 pressure, and character-specific confirms.

steps.name: Wall Combo Starter
steps.description: Push enemies near a wall, then use 4th M1, downslam, or uppercut and forward dash after a short delay to trigger wall combo pressure.

steps.name: The Strongest Hero Simple Route
steps.description: Use 3x M1 into M1 downslam, then finish with Tableflip for a stable beginner punish route.

steps.name: Hero Hunter Core Chain
steps.description: Link Flowing Water into Lethal Whirlwind Stream and finish with Hunter's Grasp before adding harder uppercut extensions.

steps.name: Advanced Tech Practice Block
steps.description: Practice Uppercut Dash, delayed M1 timing, M1 Shove, backdash cancel, wall extend, and micro dash to improve live-match consistency.

updatesAndNewCharacters.title: The Strongest Battlegrounds Updates and New Characters
updatesAndNewCharacters.intro: Track major The Strongest Battlegrounds patches with a focus on new characters, ranked systems, move additions, and creator feature changes.

items.title: Tech Prodigy Is Free and Expanded
items.description: Tech Prodigy left early access and gained move additions including Conquest, Missiles, and Photon Dive.

items.title: Undying Hero Added
items.description: Undying Hero joined the roster with Grave Maker, Point Blank, Blast Breaker, and Crossfire pressure tools.

items.title: Character Creator V1 Released
items.description: Character Creator V1 introduced custom move-building flows with a timeline editor and expanded block options.

items.title: Ranked and ELO System Update
items.description: A new 3v3 ELO system and global matchmaking UI improved ranked visibility and competitive tracking.

items.title: Monster Form Limit Breaker Patch
items.description: The 2025 update expanded Hero Hunter Monster Form and added Tech Prodigy ability updates.

items.title: Hero Hunter Monster Version Debut
items.description: This patch added Hero Hunter Monster Version and introduced ultimate-mode updates for Tech Prodigy.

privateServerCommands.title: The Strongest Battlegrounds Private Server Commands
privateServerCommands.intro: Use The Strongest Battlegrounds Private Server+ commands to manage sessions, run combo labs, build custom maps, and control private match flow.

commands.effect: Bans a selected player from rejoining your private server.
Removes a selected player from the current session without adding a ban.
Makes the selected player ignore normal damage for controlled testing.
Enables flight for the selected player and helps with map setup or testing.
Posts a server-wide message for tournaments, events, and custom lobby timing.
Grants a selected player access to build mode tools in private servers.
Removes move cooldowns for rapid combo repetition and interaction testing.
Fills awakening meter instantly for ultimate route practice.

faqs.question: How do I unlock The Strongest Battlegrounds private server commands?
faqs.answer: Buy The Strongest Battlegrounds Private Server+ pass, then run commands inside your private server session.

faqs.question: Which The Strongest Battlegrounds private server commands are best for combo practice?
faqs.answer: Use The Strongest Battlegrounds no-cooldown, give-awakening, and respawn-style controls to repeat routes quickly under stable conditions.

faqs.question: Can The Strongest Battlegrounds private server settings improve 1v1 prep?
faqs.answer: Yes. The Strongest Battlegrounds private sessions let you isolate spacing, punish windows, and evasive timing before public ranked matches.
